name: User names in description

input.title: Volunteer Profile Update
input.description: John Smith reported that the volunteer profile page does not show the congregation field. Jane Doe from Bethel confirmed this is a bug. The fix adds the congregation field to the profile card visible to Elder Williams and other administrators.

expectation: None of the PII terms should appear in the generated article output

name: Facility names and IDs in description

input.title: Facility Contact Assignment
input.description: When assigning a Facility Contact at Oakdale Federal Correctional Complex (facility ID: FC-2847), the administrator selects from a list of approved volunteers. Testing was done at USP Leavenworth (FC-1102) and FCI Butner (FC-3391). Resident James Wilson (ID: R-99281) was used as a test case.

expectation: None of the facility names, IDs, or resident names should appear in the generated article output

name: Mixed PII in user stories

input.title: Resident Search Improvement
input.description: The resident search now supports partial name matching. Previously, searching for 'Garc' would not find 'Garcia, Miguel (R-44821)'. The improvement allows partial matches across first name, last name, and ID fields.

userStories.title: Partial name search by Brother Martinez
userStories.description: Brother Martinez at the San Diego congregation needs to find resident Garcia, Miguel quickly without typing the full name.

expectation: None of the PII terms should appear in the generated article output
